title: Quasinormal Modes of Extremal Reissner-Nordstrom Black Holes via Seiberg-Witten Quantization
summary_bullets: The paper constructs an exact dictionary mapping neutral scalar perturbations of asymptotically flat extremal Reissner–Nordström black holes to the quantum Seiberg–Witten curve of SU(2) N_f=2, showing the radial equation reduces to a double-confluent Heun (DCHE) form.

Using the Nekrasov–Shatashvili free energy and its exact quantization condition the authors compute quasinormal-mode frequencies non-perturbatively (instanton expansion carried to high order) and specify a branch-selection rule that enforces ingoing-horizon / outgoing-infinity QNM boundary conditions.

Their analytic spectra reproduce high-precision numerical benchmarks for neutral massless scalars and resolve the coalescing-singularity difficulty at the strict extremal limit, allowing smooth tracking of quasi-resonances for massive probes.
